title: mentha × rotundifolia f. neglecta
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. neglecta, also known as pineapple mint or wild mint, is a hybrid plant species within the mint family, characterized by its robust growth habit and distinctive pineapple-like scent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia f. neglecta include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce nausea and headaches, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in cooking and as a garnish, allowing for various applications in both medicinal and culinary settings.
